5c1d0f6c.description: Eng agent v2 — epic in-progress or PR with changes requested?

checks.name: epic-in-progress
checks.command: count_fe=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --assignee @me --label 'type:epic,status:in-progress' --state open --json number --jq 'length') && count_be=$(gh issue list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --assignee @me --label 'type:epic,status:in-progress' --state open --json number --jq 'length') && echo $(($count_fe + $count_be))

checks.name: changes-requested-pr-be
checks.command: gh pr list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-be --author @me --state open --json reviewDecision --jq '[.[] | select(.reviewDecision == "CHANGES_REQUESTED")] | length'

checks.name: changes-requested-pr-fe
checks.command: gh pr list --repo sparkiq-gh/sparkiq-erp-fe --author @me --state open --json reviewDecision --jq '[.[] | select(.reviewDecision == "CHANGES_REQUESTED")] | length'
